purpose: Reduce distortion-controlled horizon target residual stretch from 8% to 4% and fix visible in-game V169/V125 labels.

renderer.architecture: same as V183: center ray-direction, mathematically capped edge deprojection from FOV/cameraPlane
renderer.meaning: max residual lateral stretch target is 4% instead of 8%

ui_fix.title: updated from V169 to V184
ui_fix.alert: updated from V169 skybox message to V184 horizon message

expected_tradeoff: less horizontal stretch at the borders; correction starts closer to the center than V183, so user should verify it does not become too detached like V170.
test_limit: No real browser/gameplay test executed in ChatGPT environment.
